<content>1: # AgentCube Implementation Plan
2: 
3: ## Project Overview
4: 
5: AgentCube is a Kubernetes-native AI Agent workload management platform providing:
6: - Sandbox orchestration via CRDs (AgentRuntime, CodeInterpreter)
7: - Session-aware HTTP routing with JWT authentication
8: - Redis/Valkey-based session persistence
9: - PicoD code execution daemon
10: - Python SDK and CLI toolkit
11: - Dify plugin integration
12: 
13: ## AR Mapping
14: 
15: | AR | Component | Spec Location | Description |
16: |----|-----------|---------------|-------------|
17: | AR-001 | Session Routing | specs/session-routing/ | HTTP traffic routing to sandboxes |
18: | AR-002 | Idle Cleanup | specs/idle-cleanup/ | Sandbox garbage collection controller |
19: | AR-003 | Sandbox Orchestration | specs/sandbox-orchestration/ | CRDs, Workload Manager API |
20: | AR-004 | Code Execution (PicoD) | specs/code-execution/ | Sandbox execution daemon |
21: | AR-005 | Session Store | specs/session-store/ | Redis/Valkey session persistence |
22: | AR-006 | Deployment | specs/deployment/ | Helm charts, Docker, Makefile |
23: | AR-007 | Integrations | specs/integrations/ | Dify plugin, PCAP analyzer |
24: | AR-008 | Python SDK | specs/python-sdk/ | Python client library |
25: | AR-009 | CLI Toolkit | specs/cli-toolkit/ | kubectl-agentcube CLI |

# AgentCube Implementation Plan

## Project Overview

AgentCube is a Kubernetes-native AI Agent workload management platform providing:
- Sandbox orchestration via CRDs (AgentRuntime, CodeInterpreter)
- Session-aware HTTP routing with JWT authentication
- Redis/Valkey-based session persistence
- PicoD code execution daemon
- Python SDK and CLI toolkit
- Dify plugin integration

## AR Mapping

| AR | Component | Spec Location | Description |
|----|-----------|---------------|-------------|
| AR-001 | Session Routing | specs/session-routing/ | HTTP traffic routing to sandboxes |
| AR-002 | Idle Cleanup | specs/idle-cleanup/ | Sandbox garbage collection controller |
| AR-003 | Sandbox Orchestration | specs/sandbox-orchestration/ | CRDs, Workload Manager API |
| AR-004 | Code Execution (PicoD) | specs/code-execution/ | Sandbox execution daemon |

<content>1: # AgentCube Implementation Plan - AR-023 through AR-033
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: 
5: This document details the planning and design for Architectural Requirements AR-023 through AR-033. These ARs complement the existing AR-001 through AR-011 by covering detailed sub-components, specialized controllers, caching mechanisms, CLI runtime implementations, and utility modules.
6: 
7: ---
8: 
9: ## AR Mapping Summary
10: 
11: | AR | Component | Category | Description |
12: |----|-----------|----------|-------------|
13: | AR-023 | CodeInterpreter Controller | Warm Pool Management | Controller for warm pool lifecycle and template management |
14: | AR-024 | Sandbox Types | API Types | Agent-sandbox CRD type definitions and integration |
15: | AR-025 | Token Cache | Auth/Caching | LRU cache with TTL for TokenReview results |
16: | AR-026 | HTTP Utils | Infrastructure | Shared HTTP transport, connection pooling, client utilities |
17: | AR-027 | API Errors | Infrastructure | Standardized error types and API status helpers |
18: | AR-028 | Kubernetes Provider (Python) | CLI Services | K8s Deployment/Service management for CLI |
19: | AR-029 | AgentCube Provider (Python) | CLI Services | AgentRuntime CR management for CLI |
20: | AR-030 | Build Runtime (Python) | CLI Runtimes | Container image building (local/cloud) |
21: | AR-031 | Publish Runtime (Python) | CLI Runtimes | Deployment orchestration (K8s/AgentCube) |
22: | AR-032 | Invoke Runtime (Python) | CLI Runtimes | Agent endpoint invocation with payload |
23: | AR-033 | Status Runtime (Python) | CLI Runtimes | Agent status retrieval and display |
24: 
25: ---
26: 
27: ## AR-023: CodeInterpreter Controller

40: | `pkg/controllers/warmpool_manager.go` | controllers | Warm pool lifecycle management |

82: func (w *WarmPoolManager) EnsureWarmPool(ctx context.Context, ci *v1alpha1.CodeInterpreter) error

91: 
92: func (b *SandboxTemplateBuilder) Build() *sandboxv1alpha1.SandboxTemplate

96: type PublicKeyCache struct {

252: ## AR-025: Token Cache

254: ### Purpose
255: LRU cache with TTL for TokenReview results to avoid repeated authentication calls.

258:

266: ### Structs
267: 
268: ```go
269: package workloadmanager
270: 
271: import (
272:     "container/list"
273:     "sync"
274:     "time"
275: )
276: 
277: // TokenCacheEntry represents a cached token review result
278: type TokenCacheEntry struct {
279:     Token      string
280:     Username   string
281:     ServiceAccount string
282:     Namespace  string
283:     ExpiresAt  time.Time
284:     // LRU list element
285:     element *list.Element
286: }
287: 
288: // TokenCache implements LRU cache with TTL
289: type TokenCache struct {
290:     mu       sync.RWMutex
291:     entries  map[string]*TokenCacheEntry
292:     lru      *list.List
293:     maxSize  int
294:     ttl      time.Duration
295: }
296: 
297: // NewTokenCache creates a new token cache
298: func NewTokenCache(maxSize int, ttl time.Duration) *TokenCache
299: 
300: // Get retrieves a cached token entry if not expired
301: func (c *TokenCache) Get(token string) (*TokenCacheEntry, bool)
302: 
303: // Set adds or updates a token entry
304: func (c *TokenCache) Set(token string, username, serviceAccount, namespace string)
305: 
306: // Delete removes a token entry
307: func (c *TokenCache) Delete(token string)
308: 
309: // Clear removes all entries
310: func (c *TokenCache) Clear()
311: 
312: // cleanupExpired removes expired entries (called periodically)
313: func (c *TokenCache) cleanupExpired()
314: 
315: // Len returns current cache size
316: func (c *TokenCache) Len() int
317: ```

459: ## AR-027: API Error Types
460: 
461: ### Purpose
462: Standardized error types and API status helpers for consistent error handling across the codebase.
463: 
464: ### Files to Create
465:

471: | `pkg/api/status.go` | api | APIStatus implementations |
472: | `pkg/api/response.go` | api | Common response types |
473: 
474: ### Structs
475: 
476: ```go
477: package api
478: 
479: import (
480:     "errors"
481:     "fmt"
482:     
483:     "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors"
484:     metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
485: )
486: 
487: // Sentinel errors
488: var (
489:     ErrAgentRuntimeNotFound    = errors.New("agent runtime not found")
490:     ErrCodeInterpreterNotFound = errors.New("code interpreter not found")
491:     ErrTemplateMissing         = errors.New("resource has no pod template")
492:     ErrPublicKeyMissing        = errors.New("public key not yet loaded from Router Secret")
493:     ErrSessionNotFound         = errors.New("session not found")
494:     ErrSandboxNotFound         = errors.New("sandbox not found")
495:     ErrUpstreamUnavailable     = errors.New("upstream unavailable")
496:     ErrInvalidRequest          = errors.New("invalid request")
497:     ErrInternalServer          = errors.New("internal server error")
498:     ErrUnauthorized            = errors.New("unauthorized")
499:     ErrTimeout                 = errors.New("operation timed out")
500:     ErrInvalidTimeout          = errors.New("invalid timeout format")
501:     ErrJWTSigningFailed        = errors.New("failed to sign request")
502:     ErrNoEntryPoint            = errors.New("no entry point found for sandbox")
503:     ErrSandboxUnreachable      = errors.New("sandbox unreachable")
504:     ErrSandboxTimeout          = errors.New("sandbox timeout")
505:     ErrServerOverloaded        = errors.New("server overloaded, please try again later")
506: )
507: 
508: // ErrorCode represents API error codes
509: type ErrorCode string
510: 
511: const (
512:     CodeNotFound         ErrorCode = "NOT_FOUND"
513:     CodeInvalidRequest   ErrorCode = "INVALID_REQUEST"
514:     CodeUnauthorized     ErrorCode = "UNAUTHORIZED"
515:     CodeTimeout          ErrorCode = "TIMEOUT"
516:     CodeInternalError    ErrorCode = "INTERNAL_ERROR"
517:     CodeUpstreamError    ErrorCode = "UPSTREAM_ERROR"
518:     CodeJWTSigningFailed ErrorCode = "JWT_SIGNING_FAILED"
519:     CodeServerOverloaded ErrorCode = "SERVER_OVERLOADED"
520:     CodeSandboxUnreachable ErrorCode = "SANDBOX_UNREACHABLE"
521: )
522: 
523: // ErrorResponse is the standard API error response
524: type ErrorResponse struct {
525:     Error   string    `json:"error"`
526:     Code    ErrorCode `json:"code,omitempty"`
527:     Detail  string    `json:"detail,omitempty"`
528:     Message string    `json:"message,omitempty"`
529: }
530: 
531: // APIError implements error and APIStatus interfaces
532: type APIError struct {
533:     Code       int
534:     Message    string
535:     Reason     metav1.StatusReason
536:     Details    *metav1.StatusDetails
537:     RetryAfter int
538: }
539: 
540: func (e *APIError) Error() string
541: func (e *APIError) Status() metav1.Status
542: 
543: // NewSessionNotFoundError creates a session not found error
544: func NewSessionNotFoundError(sessionID string) *APIError
545: 
546: // NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError creates a template not found error
547: func NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError(namespace, name, kind string) *APIError
548: 
549: // NewUpstreamUnavailableError wraps an upstream error
550: func NewUpstreamUnavailableError(err error) *APIError
551: 
552: // NewInternalError creates an internal server error
553: func NewInternalError(err error) *APIError
554: 
555: // IsNotFound checks if error is a not-found error
556: func IsNotFound(err error) bool
557: 
558: // IsTimeout checks if error is a timeout
559: func IsTimeout(err error) bool
560: 
561: // IsUnauthorized checks if error is unauthorized
562: func IsUnauthorized(err error) bool
563:

1587:   resources: ["sandboxtemplates", "sandboxwarmpools"]
1588:   verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch", "delete"]

1619:   template:

1621:       labels:

1623:     spec:

1627:         image: codeinterpreter-controller:latest

1633:             cpu: 100m
1634:             memory: 128Mi

1638: 
1639: ## Notes
1640: 
1641: ### AR-023: CodeInterpreter Controller
1642: 
1643: The CodeInterpreter controller handles:
1644: 1. Reconciling CodeInterpreter CRs
1645: 2. Creating/updating SandboxTemplate resources when WarmPoolSize > 0
1646: 3. Creating/updating SandboxWarmPool resources
1647: 4. Injecting PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY into templates (unless AuthModeNone)
1648: 5. Requeuing when public key not available
1649: 
1650: ### AR-028/029: Provider Pattern
1651: 
1652: Both providers follow the same pattern:
1653: 1. Initialize Kubernetes client (in-cluster or kubeconfig)
1654: 2. Provide CRUD operations for their respective resource types
1655: 3. Handle name sanitization
1656: 4. Support verbose logging
1657: 
1658: ### AR-030/031/032/033: CLI Runtime Pattern
1659: 
1660: All runtimes:
1661: 1. Take workspace_path as primary argument
1662: 2. Load metadata via MetadataService
1663: 3. Return Dict[str, Any] results
1664: 4. Support verbose logging
1665: 5. Handle errors gracefully with informative messages
1666: 
1667: ### Testing Strategy
1668: 
1669: 1. **Go Tests**: Use table-driven tests, mock interfaces where possible
1670: 2. **Python Tests**: Use unittest with mock.patch for external dependencies
1671: 3. **Integration**: E2E tests in test/e2e/ cover full workflows

# AgentCube Implementation Plan - AR-023 through AR-033

## Overview

This document details the planning and design for Architectural Requirements AR-023 through AR-033. These ARs complement the existing AR-001 through AR-011 by covering detailed sub-components, specialized controllers, caching mechanisms, CLI runtime implementations, and utility modules.

---

## AR Mapping Summary

| AR | Component | Category | Description |
|----|-----------|----------|-------------|
| AR-023 | CodeInterpreter Controller | Warm Pool Management | Controller for warm pool lifecycle and template management |
| AR-024 | Sandbox Types | API Types | Agent-sandbox CRD type definitions and integration |
| AR-025 | Token Cache | Auth/Caching | LRU cache with TTL for TokenReview results |
| AR-026 | HTTP Utils | Infrastructure | Shared HTTP transport, connection pooling, client utilities |
| AR-027 | API Errors | Infrastructure | Standardized error types and API status helpers |
| AR-028 | Kubernetes Provider (Python) | CLI Services | K8s Deployment/Service management for CLI |
| AR-029 | AgentCube Provider (Python) | CLI Services | AgentRuntime CR management for CLI |
| AR-030 | Build Runtime (Python) | CLI Runtimes | Container image building (local/cloud) |

21: 	"time"
22: )
23: 
24: // TokenCache caches authentication tokens
25: type TokenCache struct {
26: 	cache   map[string]tokenEntry
27: 	maxSize int
28: 	ttl     time.Duration
29: 	mu      sync.RWMutex
30: }
31: 
32: type tokenEntry struct {
33: 	token     string
34: 	expiresAt time.Time
35: }
36: 
37: // NewTokenCache creates a new token cache
38: func NewTokenCache(maxSize int, ttl time.Duration) *TokenCache {
39: 	return &TokenCache{
40: 		cache:   make(map[string]tokenEntry),
41: 		maxSize: maxSize,
42: 		ttl:     ttl,
43: 	}
44: }
45: 
46: // Get retrieves a token from the cache
47: func (c *TokenCache) Get(key string) (string, bool) {
48: 	c.mu.RLock()
49: 	entry, exists := c.cache[key]
50: 	c.mu.RUnlock()
51: 
52: 	if !exists {
53: 		return "", false
54: 	}
55: 
56: 	if time.Now().After(entry.expiresAt) {
57: 		c.mu.Lock()
58: 		delete(c.cache, key)
59: 		c.mu.Unlock()
60: 		return "", false
61: 	}
62: 
63: 	return entry.token, true
64: }
65: 
66: // Set stores a token in the cache
67: func (c *TokenCache) Set(key, token string) {
68: 	c.mu.Lock()
69: 	defer c.mu.Unlock()
70: 
71: 	// Simple eviction: clear if at capacity
72: 	if len(c.cache) >= c.maxSize {
73: 		c.cache = make(map[string]tokenEntry)
74: 	}
75: 
76: 	c.cache[key] = tokenEntry{
77: 		token:     token,
78: 		expiresAt: time.Now().Add(c.ttl),
79: 	}
80: }
81: 
82: // Delete removes a token from the cache
83: func (c *TokenCache) Delete(key string) {
84: 	c.mu.Lock()
85: 	delete(c.cache, key)
86: 	c.mu.Unlock()
87: }

25: func TestNewAPIError(t *testing.T) {
26: 	err := NewAPIError("TEST_CODE", "test message")
27: 	assert.NotNil(t, err)
28: 	assert.Equal(t, "TEST_CODE", err.Code)

33: func TestNewSessionNotFoundError(t *testing.T) {
34: 	err := NewSessionNotFoundError("session-123")
35: 	assert.NotNil(t, err)
36: 	assert.Equal(t, "SESSION_NOT_FOUND", err.Code)
37: 	assert.Contains(t, err.Message, "session-123")
38: 	assert.Contains(t, err.Message, "not found")
39: }
40:

42: 	err := NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError("default", "my-template", "AgentRuntime")

45: 	assert.Contains(t, err.Message, "AgentRuntime")

47: 	assert.Contains(t, err.Message, "my-template")
48: }

52: 	assert.NotNil(t, ErrCodeInterpreterNotFound)
53: 	assert.NotNil(t, ErrTemplateMissing)
54: 	assert.NotNil(t, ErrPublicKeyMissing)

56: 	assert.NotNil(t, ErrInvalidRequest)

60: 	assert.NotNil(t, ErrSandboxCreationTimeout)
61: 	assert.NotNil(t, ErrSandboxUnreachable)
62: 	assert.NotNil(t, ErrSandboxTimeout)
63: }
64: 
65: func TestAPIErrorWithDetail(t *testing.T) {
66: 	err := &APIError{

68: 		Message: "test message",

package api

import (
	"net/http"
	"testing"

	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
)

func TestNewAPIError(t *testing.T) {
	err := NewAPIError("TEST_CODE", "test message")
	assert.NotNil(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "TEST_CODE", err.Code)
	assert.Equal(t, "test message", err.Message)
	assert.Equal(t, "test message", err.Error())
}

func TestNewSessionNotFoundError(t *testing.T) {
	err := NewSessionNotFoundError("session-123")
	assert.NotNil(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusNotFound, err.ErrStatus.Code)
	assert.Contains(t, err.Error(), "session-123")
	assert.Contains(t, err.Error(), "not found")
}

func TestNewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError(t *testing.T) {
	err := NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError("default", "my-template", "AgentRuntime")
	assert.NotNil(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusNotFound, err.ErrStatus.Code)
	assert.Contains(t, err.Error(), "AgentRuntime")
	assert.Contains(t, err.Error(), "default")
	assert.Contains(t, err.Error(), "my-template")
}

func TestSentinelErrors(t *testing.T) {
	assert.NotNil(t, ErrAgentRuntimeNotFound)
	assert.NotNil(t, ErrCodeInterpreterNotFound)
	assert.NotNil(t, ErrTemplateMissing)
	assert.NotNil(t, ErrPublicKeyMissing)
	assert.NotNil(t, ErrSessionNotFound)
	assert.NotNil(t, ErrInvalidRequest)
	assert.NotNil(t, ErrInternalServerError)
	assert.NotNil(t, ErrUnauthorized)
	assert.NotNil(t, ErrSandboxTemplateNotFound)
	assert.NotNil(t, ErrSandboxCreationTimeout)
	assert.NotNil(t, ErrSandboxUnreachable)
	assert.NotNil(t, ErrSandboxTimeout)
}

func TestAPIErrorWithDetail(t *testing.T) {
	err := &APIError{
		Code:    "TEST_CODE",
		Message: "test message",
		Detail:  "additional detail",
	}
	assert.Equal(t, "TEST_CODE", err.Code)
	assert.Equal(t, "test message", err.Message)
	assert.Equal(t, "additional detail", err.Detail)
}

func TestStatusError(t *testing.T) {
	err := NewNotFoundError("resource", "my-resource")
	assert.NotNil(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusNotFound, err.ErrStatus.Code)
	assert.Contains(t, err.Error(), "my-resource")
	assert.Contains(t, err.Error(), "not found")
}

func TestIsNotFound(t *testing.T) {
	assert.True(t, IsNotFound(ErrAgentRuntimeNotFound))
	assert.True(t, IsNotFound(NewNotFoundError("test", "resource")))
	assert.False(t, IsNotFound(nil))
	assert.False(t, IsNotFound(ErrUnauthorized))
}

func TestIsUnauthorized(t *testing.T) {
	assert.True(t, IsUnauthorized(ErrUnauthorized))
	assert.True(t, IsUnauthorized(NewUnauthorizedError("unauthorized")))
	assert.False(t, IsUnauthorized(nil))
	assert.False(t, IsUnauthorized(ErrAgentRuntimeNotFound))
}

func TestIsTimeout(t *testing.T) {
	assert.True(t, IsTimeout(ErrSandboxCreationTimeout))
	assert.True(t, IsTimeout(NewTimeoutError("operation")))
	assert.False(t, IsTimeout(nil))
	assert.False(t, IsTimeout(ErrAgentRuntimeNotFound))
}

func TestHTTPStatusFromError(t *testing.T) {
	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, HTTPStatusFromError(nil))
	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusNotFound, HTTPStatusFromError(ErrAgentRuntimeNotFound))
	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusUnauthorized, HTTPStatusFromError(ErrUnauthorized))
	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusInternalServerError, HTTPStatusFromError(ErrInternalServerError))
}
